food.label: Food
food.description: Spend on better meals to keep your body strong. Higher number in food may result in favorable outcomes in physical events.

health.label: Health
health.description: Purchase herbal medicines and rest to restore your vitality. A low health number may result in health complications

beauty.label: Beauty
beauty.description: Invest in cosmetics and fine garments to improve your appearance. Certain NPCs might like you more, but some might hate you regardless.

charity.label: Charity
charity.description: Donate to the poor or temple offerings. Your compassion grows.
